SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
146
artifact_summary: A structured table mapping SCADA tag names for industrial equipment such as pumps and alarms to their corresponding addresses and functional descriptions.
artifact_blurb: This artifact is a comprehensive SCADA point definition table that establishes a precise mapping between human-readable tag names for critical industrial assets (e.g., pumps, valves, alarms) and their specific system addresses, alongside detailed functional descriptions to support integration and troubleshooting.
